reference: WHEN HE CAME BACK TO THE DRAWING ROOM A TOILET BOTTLE OF EAU DE COLOGNE IN HIS HAND WITH HER LACE HANDKERCHIEF HE BATHED HER TEMPLES AND FOREHEAD
text: When he came back to the drawing room, a toilet bottle of Eau de Cologne in his hand, with her lace handkerchief he bathed her temples and forehead.
